rationale: PR claims to improve AI writing exercise mobile layout by stacking panes vertically, single-column feedback grid, version bump to 19.6. The diff in assets/css/writing-exercise.css adds a single @media (max-width: 768px) block that does exactly that: flex-direction: column on #ielts-writing-container, width/max-width 100% on left/right cols, grid-template-columns: 1fr on .ielts-writing-results-grid, flex-direction: column on .ielts-writing-combined-band and .ielts-results-header. ielts-course-manager.php bumps both the plugin header Version comment and the IELTS_CM_VERSION define from 19.5 to 19.6 consistently. Closed without merge for non-technical reasons; the diff itself is a clean, focused CSS-only responsive-design change matching the stated scope.
